mainEntity.name: How to value future medical needs in chem exposure comp claim Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Expert life care plan calculates projected costs.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Use life care plans from experts projecting costs based on condition prognosis.** Idaho awards ongoing care for chronic exposures.[6] Key factors: permanency rating, specialist estimates, discount to present value. Include monitoring for latency diseases. Attorneys secure higher future awards.
